title: Section component for semantic content grouping with collapsible support
purpose: Provides a reusable section container with heading, description, and optional collapsible functionality for organizing UI content.
module_context: Exports a Section component that accepts heading, description, level, divider, collapsible, and other props to structure content with semantic HTML and responsive design.

steps.content: Validate and clamp the heading level between 1 and 6.
Map the validated level to a corresponding HTML heading tag.
Return the heading tag as a React element type.
Match the heading level to a predefined size class string.
Return the appropriate text size and weight classes for the heading.
Default to a standard size class for invalid level values.
Initialize the collapsed state based on the initial prop.
IF the section is marked as hidden, return null immediately.
Determine the heading tag and size classes based on the level prop.
Render the section header with heading and optional description.
IF the section is collapsible, render a toggle button with appropriate icon.
Render a divider if the divider prop is enabled.
Render the section content only if not collapsed.
